changes.content: Updated development documentation and development roadmap
Removed playground files, added storybook real-time preview mode for demonstrations
types TypeScript type import syntax change. After upgrade, please modify the original type syntax
Updated online development roadmap documentation, showcasing ongoing development plans
Updated homepage introduction and communication requirements documentation. All antdx components have been fully replicated
文档更新，修复已知bug, v1.1.6 版本更新
changes.author: 何嘉悦

changes.content: Updated online development roadmap documentation, showcasing ongoing development plans
Updated Guide Documentation Development Documentation, fixed documentation introduction error issues
Updated online development roadmap documentation, will showcase ongoing development plans

Updated Guide Documentation Development Documentation, focusing on modifying development commands, contributing code, local debugging full process introduction. Standardize development and pr submission

changes.author: 何嘉悦

changes.content: Optimized compatibility, Sender input component, due to using defineModel syntax, this syntax is only available in Vue 3.4+ versions, now changed this syntax to low-version syntax (Seamless replacement, no need to change original syntax)
Updated online development roadmap documentation, will showcase ongoing development plans

Updated Guide Documentation Development Documentation, focusing on modifying development commands, contributing code, local debugging full process introduction. Standardize development and pr submission
Improved Chinese/English documentation content
Added documentation update log module
Integrated ESLint 9.x and Oxlint to standardize development process
Added build configuration: automatically export full/on-demand components based on component file names

changes.author: 何嘉悦

changes.content: Added Thinking thinking component for displaying thinking process under streaming interface output
Added ThoughtChain thought chain component for displaying thinking process under streaming interface output
Added Welcome welcome component for users to quickly integrate beautiful welcome introduction cards
Fixed BubbleList bubble list component, after clearing array and adding new bubbles, losing auto-scroll issue
BubbleList component added back to bottom button, and added hover content area scrollbar appearance. Enhanced interaction experience
Fixed BubbleList bubble list component auto-scroll failure issue under streaming interface output. And decoupled BubbleList component from typing component
Fixed BubbleList bubble list component maxWidth failure issue
BubbleList component: Added trigger-indices property for monitoring specified bubble @complete completion callbacks
Bubble bubble component, when not customizing content slots, automatically inherit and support fog effect properties
修复bubbleList范型bug
changes.author: Json_Lee

changes.content: Bubble component: Deprecated typing.speed property value, changed to typing.step (aligned with ant-design-x)
Bubble component: Added interrupt output (pause), continue typing (resume) and destroy (destroy) instance methods
Bubble component: Added operation monitoring events
Bubble component: Deprecated typing.step property value, changed to typing.speed to control typing speed
Bubble component: Added avatar-size and avatar-gap properties to control bubble styles when no avatar is present
[feat](XSender)：配置属性说明文档
changes.author: jianfv

changes.content: Fixed Sender, MentionSender footer slot click auto-focus issue
Sender component added variants, footer, command trigger functionality
New MentionSender component, another command way of the Sender component
Sender component added input-style property for developers to customize built-in input box styles
Sender component optimized the send button state to disabled when there's no value, @submit method will also be disabled. Added submit-btn-disabled property for developers to actively control
Sender input component: two-way binding syntax change. Changed from previous v-model:value to direct v-model binding
Fixed Sender input component v-model two-way binding failure issue
Fixed Sender input component in loading state, still able to trigger @submit method bug
Fixed Sender input component in read-only state, still able to trigger value modification bug
Sender component: Added @recording-change event to monitor built-in recording button click state
Sender component: Added start recording (startRecording) and stop recording (stopRecording) instance methods
Fixed Sender input component autosize property failure bug
Added Prompts prompt collection component, used to display a set of predefined questions or suggestions related to the current context

Added Conversations conversation management component. Supports grouped display, menu interaction, scroll loading, custom styling and other features. Suitable for message lists, file management, task grouping and other scenarios
Added FilesCard file card component, supporting visual presentation of multiple file types (images, documents, compressed packages, etc.)
Added Attachments attachment upload component, supporting file list display, upload, drag interaction, scroll browsing and other features
新增 useRecord useSend useXStream 钩子函数和 XRequest 工具类
changes.author: 何嘉悦

changes.content: Added useRecord hook function, solving the issue when users want to customize Sender input component's #action-list slot while also wanting to retain the component's built-in browser speech recognition API method
Added useXStream hook function, for SSE protocol streaming requests, can automatically get streaming data; supports starting streaming requests, interrupting streaming requests
Added useSend hook function, can be used alone: pass in start and end methods, returns method loading state. More low-level, flexible control
修改xrequest的send方法
changes.author: Json_Lee

changes.content: Added XRequest utility class, for SSE protocol streaming requests, configure interface base address, use send to send requests, instance has many state listeners for this request
